title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a producer in Nigeria or Pakistan trying to sell beats online, you've probably hit a roadblock – PayPal won't accept your account. Even if you're based in the US, you might still face restrictions on Gumroad or Stripe. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering a Web3 solution that lets you accept crypto payments and sell digital downloads without getting shut down. With our platform, you can focus on creating the beats, not worrying about getting paid.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online without PayPal or Gumroad means you can't rely on traditional payment processors. This is a major problem for producers who want to monetize their digital products. By using Unchained Commerce's Web3 solution, you can bypass these restrictions and get paid directly in crypto. This means no more worrying about having a PayPal account or getting kicked off Gumroad for not meeting their requirements.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our platform uses Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration that generates multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. This allows buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, whether it's Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, or one of the 300+ other supported coins. Once the payment is made, the buyer receives the digital download automatically, without any need for manual intervention.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce is designed for digital creators who want to sell their products without restrictions. Whether you're a producer from Nigeria, Pakistan, or anywhere else, our platform gives you the freedom to get paid directly in crypto. We also cater to solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores, providing them with a simple and secure way to integrate Web3 payments into their applications.
Unchained Commerce's Web3 solution lets you sell digital products online without PayPal or Gumroad restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our solution consists of the Core Shop Engine, Admin Dashboard, and Web3 Wallet Connect. The Core Shop Engine handles automated delivery and payment verification, while the Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management. Web3 Wallet Connect is the frontend wallet integration that enables multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds. By working together, these components provide a seamless and secure way to sell digital products online without PayPal or Gumroad.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling your beats online with crypto payments, follow these steps: sign up for Unchained Commerce and set up your store, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect for frontend wallet integration, create your digital products and set their prices, and promote your store to potential buyers. Once you've set up your store, you can focus on creating more beats and growing your customer base.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
With our platform, you can accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a platform to sell ebook downloads without fees, consider using Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, which integrates with Web3 Wallet Connect for seamless crypto payments. Even if you're selling Notion templates for Bitcoin, our solution can help you accept payments directly in crypto. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

Once you've set up your store, you can focus on creating more beats and growing your customer base.
